title: [MSFT][PyCDE] Replace `msft.module` et. al. with the `hw` versions
body:
There are several reasons these are separate:
1) When `msft.module` lowers to an `hw.module`, it adds a module parameter to track its place in the instance hierarchy. Instead of this, I think the right solution is to add an op to request the instance path, then run a pass which locates those ops and adds the parameters to `hw.module`s as needed. This will lead to nicer RTL output in the very common case where the instance hierarchy is not used.
2) `msft.module` contains `childAppIDBases`. This is actually the output from a pass and merely serves to facilitate efficient access. This is better done as an analysis pass which can be accessed on demand.
3) `fileName` can pretty easily be replaced with `OutputFileAttr` directly. This one was just for frontend convenience anyway.
